ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., Sheets, Pillowcases) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 39" x 75") */,
  "regular_price" TEXT /* Regular price of the product */,
  "discounted_price" TEXT /* Discounted price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for when to reorder the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., bamboo, cotton) */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Thread count of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured on the website */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product based on customer reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Sheets, Pillowcases) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Layla, Luxe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used during the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Total discount amount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Regular price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discounted_price" TEXT /* Discounted price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the customer's review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Manager, Sales) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or string to store role permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
